历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (including physics category) were approximately 7336 → 5218 → 12578 → 9686 → 10038. In 2023, due to batch merger, there was a significant drop (12578), recovering to 9686 in 2024, and stabilizing around 10038 in 2025. Rankings have stabilized in recent two years, with a 2025 baseline of about 10038. Provincial science (including physics category) enrollment plans: 61 in both 2021 and 2022, sharply increased to 120 in 2023, then dropped back to 63 in 2024–2025. The 2026 plan is 64, a slight increase of 1 (+1.6%) compared to 2025, with minimal impact on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 84th on the Soft Science main ranking (2026), stable in the 75–84 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Reputation has been stable recently, with no significant negative public opinion. Douyin comprehensive popularity not in the top 100, attention level moderate. No record of filing gaps, stable application psychology. Electrical Engineering (A), Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics (A-) are the school's flagship disciplines, highly aligned with the power industry, strongly attracting related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Electrical Engineering and Automation had a social popularity of 'highly recommended', Energy and Power category 'recommended', Electronic Information/Communication 'highly recommended', Computer category 'recommended'. Overall application heat for related engineering majors continues to rise. The estimated number of physics category examinees in the province for 2026 is about 79,936, a slight decrease from 80,421 in 2025 (-0.6%), easing competition slightly. The university is located in Beijing, offering some regional appeal to Jilin candidates.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the stabilization of historical rankings in recent two years, slight expansion of enrollment plan in 2026 (+1.6%), rising social heat for flagship majors like electrical engineering, and a slight decrease in provincial physics examinees, competition is expected to intensify slightly in 2026, with the minimum ranking moving slightly forward compared to 2025. Predicted minimum ranking: approximately 10,084, with a range of 9,584–10,584.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<9,584), you can focus on reaching for flagship majors like Electrical Engineering and Automation. North China Electric Power University's electrical majors have outstanding employment advantages, so it is recommended to prioritize major directions strongly related to the power industry.
